title: Jerry Test Specification Schema
description: Validates BDD test specification (Feature file) YAML frontmatter produced by the tspec-generator agent. Implements Clark transformation output structure. Source: skills/test-spec/rules/clark-transformation-rules.md, skills/test-spec/SKILL.md.

source_use_case.description: Source use case identifier. Must reference a valid use case ID. Format: UC-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}.

source_title.description: Title of the source use case. Verbatim from $.title per RULE-C1-01.

source_detail_level.description: Detail level of the source use case at generation time. Restricted to ESSENTIAL_OUTLINE and FULLY_DESCRIBED by this enum; BRIEFLY_DESCRIBED and BULLETED_OUTLINE are excluded from the enum and will fail schema validation if present. Clark transformation requires >= ESSENTIAL_OUTLINE per RULE-IV-02.

source_goal_level.description: Goal level of the source use case. Determines coverage target: USER_GOAL=100%, SUBFUNCTION=80%, SUMMARY=60%.

generated_by.description: Generator agent identifier. Always tspec-generator for Clark transformation output.

scenario_count.description: Total number of Gherkin scenarios generated. Must equal coverage.mapped_flows.

basic_flow_mapped.description: Whether the basic flow has been mapped to a happy-path scenario. Must be true for valid output.

alternative_flows_mapped.description: Count of alternative flows (AF-{NN}) mapped to scenarios.

extensions_mapped.description: Count of extensions (EXT-{step}{letter}) mapped to scenarios.

total_flows.description: Total number of flows in the source use case (1 basic + alternatives + extensions).

mapped_flows.description: Number of flows successfully mapped to Gherkin scenarios.

coverage_percentage.description: Mapped flows / total flows * 100. Optional; computable from mapped_flows and total_flows.

coverage.description: Flow-to-scenario coverage metrics per RULE-C7-01 traceability matrix.

slice_id.description: UC 2.0 slice identifier if this test spec targets a specific slice. Null for full use case coverage.

all_scenarios_traceable.description: Whether every generated scenario traces back to a source flow via the traceability matrix.

no_orphan_flows.description: Whether all source flows have at least one corresponding scenario.

coverage_target_met.description: Whether coverage meets goal-level target. USER_GOAL requires 100%, SUBFUNCTION 80%, SUMMARY 60%.

quality.description: Traceability quality flags set by tspec-generator self-validation.

warnings.description: Generation warnings (e.g., low-confidence step type mappings, missing extension conditions).
